mensajes.registroExitoso: Your account has been created successfully
mensajes.errorGenerico: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

platformUse.title: 1. Platform use
platformUse.body: By creating an account on Skin4All, you agree to use the platform responsibly and not affect the security, availability, or experience of other users.

accountPrivacy.title: 2. Account and privacy
accountPrivacy.body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential. The information you provide will be handled according to our privacy practices and used only to improve your in-app experience.

contentRecommendations.title: 3. Content and recommendations
contentRecommendations.body: Routines and recommendations shown in the app are for informational purposes only and do not replace professional medical or dermatological advice.

changes.title: 4. Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms at any time. If important changes are made, we will notify you within the platform.
